featured.title: Cybersecurity Foundations — Getting Started in 10 Minutes
featured.description: A complete intro to the platform: setting up your environment, running your first recon script, and understanding the toolchain behind our walkthroughs.

tutorials.title: Installing NetHunter Rootless — Complete Setup Guide
tutorials.description: Get a full Kali Linux environment on any Android device — no root required. Covers getting Termux, installing NetHunter Rootless, and launching your first session.
tutorials.imageAlt: Android phone with terminal and security tools

tutorials.title: M@☆ Zero-Rated Scanner v76.45 — Complete Setup Guide
tutorials.description: The ultimate framework for precision zero-rated network discovery and host analysis. Install Termux, verify your device architecture, deploy the scanner, and register your V-Key for full access.
tutorials.imageAlt: M@☆ Zero-Rated Scanner running in Termux terminal
